# ASAP Pest & Wildlife Removal

> Atlanta-based wildlife removal and pest control company. Humane wildlife trapping and exclusion, rodent work, insect and pest management, commercial accounts. Family-owned, licensed, and focused on solving the problem at its source — not just spraying and leaving.

## About

ASAP Pest & Wildlife Removal serves the greater Metro Atlanta area (Fulton, Cobb, DeKalb, Gwinnett, Forsyth counties). The company handles wildlife removal, full-structure exclusion work, pest control, and commercial accounts. Standard practice is a thorough inspection before any quote, humane trapping where applicable, and warrantied exclusion repairs that keep animals out for good.

## Services

- Wildlife removal: raccoons, squirrels (gray and flying), bats, opossums, snakes, rats, mice, birds, beavers, coyotes, armadillos, foxes, geese, gophers, moles, otters, rabbits, turtles, voles, wild hogs. Humane trap-and-relocate where legal; sealed-exclusion repairs so they don't come back.
- Pest control: rodents, roaches, ants, termites, mosquitoes, spiders, fleas, ticks, bed bugs, bees, wasps, hornets.
- Commercial services: restaurants, offices, multi-family properties, HOA contracts, warranty exclusion work.
- Inspection and quote: free for residential; same-day service available most days.

## Service area

Metro Atlanta, Georgia. Typical response zip codes include 30303 through 30349 and surrounding cities: Atlanta, Marietta, Decatur, Roswell, Alpharetta, Kennesaw, Smyrna, Sandy Springs, Lawrenceville, Duluth.

## Contact

- Phone: (770) 450-1744
- Email: info@removeasap.com
- Business address: 2990 Pine Canyon Dr SW, Unit 11, Atlanta, GA 30331
- Booking: https://removeasap.com/contact/

## Hours

Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern. Emergency service available outside these hours by phone.

## Pricing

Pricing varies by species, scope, and extent of exclusion work. Free quotes for residential. Commercial contracts are quoted per property. Contact us at (770) 450-1744 for a same-day estimate.
